name: Tuna Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2-ounce can tuna in water, drained and flaked
1 small green pepper, cut into strips
1 small sweet red pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions, adding broccoli during the last 3 minutes of cooking; drain.
2. Rinse with cold water to cool quickly; drain well.
3. In a large bowl, stir together cooled pasta and broccoli and the remaining ingredients.
4. Cover; refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
Source:
"Ragú"
S (Internet address):
"http://www.eat.com/index.html"
Yield:
1 1/3 cups
T (Refrigeration):
2:00
